title: Do A Flip
description: Make mobs have a chance of performing a flip when falling
body:
**Do a Flip** is a client-side only mod that makes mobs have a chance of doing a front/back flip upon falling a distance greater than 2 blocks.\
The mod comes with the following config options:

-   **flipChance** - The chance between 0 and 1 of a mob doing a flip. It defaults to 0.35 which is equal to 35%
-   **invertMobs** - Inverts the **flippingMobs** option to turn it into a blacklist instead
-   **flippingMobs** - A list of mobs that can do a flip, by default it's a blacklist contains the id of the **bat, armor stand, ender dragon and wither** because of **invertMobs** being true by default
